titleStmt.title: SII 24.137: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 137. (A.R. No. 76 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an endowment of money for the merit of a person by name Vāgalarkōḍāli alias ••• nātha-Pallavaraiyaṉ, by his wife and daughter for conducting a special festival to god Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-perumāḷ in the temple on the day of Rōhiṇī which was his natal star. Mentions the Śrīkāryam officer Kavattalaiyuḍaiyāṉ Viḻumiyadēvaṉ Perumāṉ (see No. 136 above). The details of date viz., 7th year, Mithuṉa, ba. 12, Tuesday, Kārttigai, regularly correspond to A.D. 1185, May 28, Tuesday; ·10; f.d.n. ·08.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāytta tirumakaḷum ceyamakaḷum ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmati pol kuṭai viḷaṅka vel ventaraṭi va
ṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅka cakkaramuñ ceṅkolum tikkaṉaittum cela naṭātti kaṟpakattār kayaltāṅki poṟpamainta muṭi
puṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṅ(ṅ)āsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuva
ṉac cakkaravattikaḷ Uṭaiyār śrī vira rājendradevaṟku yāṇṭu 7Āvatu mituna nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu tuvādaciyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa kārttikai nāḷ periya koyil
śrī kāriyam kavattalaiyuṭaiyāṉ viḻumiya tevaṉ perumāṉum tiruppati śrī vaiyiṣṇa vakaḷil kuravacerit tiruvaraṅka vaḷḷalārum kuṭavāyil periya koyiṟpiriyarum katavāymaṅkalattu viṟṟiruntā nampiyum muṅ
kiṟkuṭi śrī kurukūr nampiyum Iṭavai kanta nampiyum toṭ ṭattu Aruḷmāritāsarum tiruc cittirakūṭatāsarum Iṭavait tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa nampiyum kantāṭai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa nampiyum Iruṅkaṇṭi tirukkuṟuṅkuṭi nam
piyum ciṟupuḷḷūr śrīcaṭakopappiriyaṉum kattu sapaiyāril Āritaṉ cirākavaṉ cirākavappiḷḷaiyum Āritaṉ cipuṇṭarika nārāyaṇa paṭ(ṭaṉu)m kavuṇiyaṉ Āṭkoṇṭa villipaṭṭaṉum pāratāyaṉ ciriḷaṅko paṭṭanum pāratāyaṉ kecavaṉ puruṣotta
ma paṭṭanum pāratāyaṉ Arumārinampiyum pākavata śapaikku camainta paṇṭāra totakirik kolavāmaṉa paṭṭanum Ilaicciṉaik kaṅkāṇi Āriyaṉ lapaṭṭaṉum kovinta paṭṭanum śrīvaiṣṇavakkaṅkāṇikka ṉ kolaṅkariyāṉāna pa
rum kaṅkāṇi muṭaiyāṉ Āṭ koṇṭa villiyum koyil kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāṉa tiruvamu num paḷḷikoṇṭā ṉāṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷappiriyanum koṟṟamaṅkala
muṭaiyāṉ kotaṇṭarāmaṉum mā coti Aṇi Araṅkappiriyaṇum kuṟumpiluṭaiyāṉ karuṇākarappiriyaṉum kaṅkāṇi vākalan koṭāliyāṉa ṉāta ppallavaraiyaṉukku naṉṟāka tāṟum Ivaṉ piṟantanāḷ Urocaṇiyile
Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ ciṟapput tiruvārātaṉaṅkoṇṭaruḷi tiruvaraṅkatevaṉ marakkālāle kalavariciyāl tirup poṉakattukkum neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum cātti Aruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum policaiyāle ca
ntirātittavaṟ celvatāka Ivaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ kuṉittāḷum Ivaṉ makaḷ tāyilum nallāḷum Upaiyamāka śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 2 1000 Ik kācu Iraṇṭāyiramum Oṭuk(ku)kik koṇṭu Ikkācukku māsattu nāṟpatu kā
cu policai polivatākavum . Ikkācu koṇṭu Ippaṭi celuttakkaṭavom Āṉom Ivvaṉaivom . Itu patineṭṭu maṇṭalattu śrī vaiyiṣṇavar rakṣai . ḷa
Digital edition of SII 24.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
